mapper.select: SELECT id, consultation_id, type, content, pdf_url, status, signed_by, signed_time, template_id, create_time, update_time FROM report WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, consultation_id, type, content, pdf_url, status, signed_by, signed_time, template_id, create_time, update_time FROM report WHERE consultation_id = #{consultationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report (consultation_id, type, content, status, template_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{consultationId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{status}, #{templateId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET content = #{content}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE report SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE report SET status = #{status}, signed_by = #{signedBy}, signed_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
